task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Strength & Size Phase 1' routine

task_completion.description: Navigate to the 'Lower Body Focus' training day
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Lower Body Focus' training day expanded or selected within the routine.
In the list of exercises for the 'Lower Body Focus' day, 'Squat' is positioned at the very top (first in order).

task_completion.description: Set 'Leg Extension' as the second exercise
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the list of exercises for the 'Lower Body Focus' day, 'Leg Extension' is positioned directly below 'Squat' (second in order).

task_completion.description: Set 'Standing Calf Raises' as the third exercise
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the list of exercises for the 'Lower Body Focus' day, 'Standing Calf Raises' is positioned directly below 'Leg Extension' (third in order).

task_completion.description: Ensure no exercises were added or deleted
task_completion.visual_evidence: The list of exercises for the 'Lower Body Focus' day contains exactly three exercises (Squat, Leg Extension, Standing Calf Raises) with no missing or additional exercises.

integrity.description: Agent used the wger web GUI to reorder exercises
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the wger web interface (e.g., drag-and-drop or clicking reorder buttons), rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: Agent did not use a text editor to fake the output

integrity.description: Results appear in the genuine wger application
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches the standard wger fitness manager layout, complete with navigation menus and proper styling.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The routine name is 'Strength & Size Phase 1'. The training day name is 'Lower Body Focus'. The expected final order of exercises is: 1. Squat, 2. Leg Extension, 3. Standing Calf Raises. Exactly these three exercises must be present; no exercises should be added or deleted.
